title: Chelsea want Â£65m for Nkunku - Wednesday's gossip
content:
Guardian back page

Star back page

Express back page

Telegraph lead sports page

Mirror back page

1 of 5

Chelsea set price for Christopher Nkunku, Arsenal are chasing Martin Zubimendi, and Marcus Rashford favours a move to Barcelona...

Chelseawill want a Â£65m fee for striker Christopher Nkunku, 27, amid interest fromBayern Munich, with the France international reportedly unhappy at Stamford Bridge.(Athletic),external

Arsenalare in advanced talks to signReal Sociedadand Spain midfielder Martin Zubimendi, 25, in a Â£51m summer deal.(Mail),external

Marcus Rashford, 27, would prefer a move toBarcelonaahead of other options this month should the forward leaveManchester United. (Sport - in Spanish,external)

Manchester United'srivals are waiting to pounce on January deals for England duo Rashford and Kobbie Mainoo, 19, and Argentina forward Alejandro Garnacho, 20, as they anticipate co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe wanting to avoid frantic profit and sustainability rules sales on 30 June to stay within financial rules.(Telegraph),external

Juventusare closing in on a loan deal for 26-year-oldParis St-Germainand France forward Randal Kolo Muani.(Gazzetta dello Sport - in Italian),external

Argentina forward Lionel Messi, 37, could rejoinBarcelonaon loan during the Major League Soccer off-season once he signs a new contract withInter Miami.(El Nacional - in Spanish),external

Liverpoolhave rejected a Â£70m bid from Saudi Arabian clubAl-Hilalfor Uruguay striker Darwin Nunez, 25.(Anfield Watch),external

West Hamare interested in signing Portugal striker Andre Silva, 29, on loan fromRB Leipzigfor the remainder of the season.(Guardian),external

Aston Villahave rejected a bid in the region of Â£40m fromWest Hamfor 21-year-old Colombia striker Jhon Duran.(Talksport),external

Liverpoolare keen onNurnbergstriker Stefanos Tzimas, 19, with the Greek forward potentially available for about Â£20m and also attracting interest fromChelsea,BrightonandAston Villa.(Sky - in German),external

Man Utd could seek over Â£40m for Garnacho - Tuesday's gossip

Listen to the latest Football Daily podcast

Get the latest from your club

Manchester Unitedare among the clubs considering Â£40m-rated Japan andParmagoalkeeper Zion Suzuki, 22.(Talksport),external

Arsenaland Italy midfielder Jorginho, 33, whose contract expires in the summer, is a target for Brazilian clubFlamengo.(Sky Sports),external

France centre-back Axel Disasi, 26, is the latest player who could be heading out ofChelseadue to a lack of game time.(Mirror),external

Newcastlehave been looking at 27-year-old England andAC Milancentre-back Fikayo Tomori.(Football Insider),external

Celticare one of several clubs interested in signingAston Villa'sEnglish striker Louie Barry, 21, on loan, but the Premier League side are assessing their options.(Sky Sports),external

West Hamare in talks withMarseilleover a deal for 22-year-old French forward Elye Wahi.(ESPN),external

The Hammers have also added Nurnberg's Finn Jeltsch, 18, to their wishlist for the summer but face competition from Premier League and Bundesliga clubs for the German defender.(Florian Plettenberg),external

Saudi Pro League chief executive Omar Mugharbel says it is a "matter of time" before a club from the league signsReal Madridand Brazil forward Vinicius Junior, 24.(Marca - in Spanish),external

FormerManchester Unitedand Spain midfielder Ander Herrera, 35, is set to join Argentine clubBoca Juniorsfrom La Liga sideAthletic Bilbao.(Fabrizio Romano),external

Sheffield Unitedhave offered Â£7m forLeicester'sRepublic of Ireland striker Tom Cannon, 22, who has been recalled from his loan at Stoke.(Football Insider),external

Sunderlandhave also made a bid to sign Cannon, with an eye to purchase the Republic of Ireland international if they are promoted this season. (Sunderland Echo,external)

Middlesbroughare in advanced talks to signHull Cityleft-back Ryan Giles, who made 45 appearances for Boro while on loan fromWolvesin their 22/23 season. (Football League World,external)

Cardiff Cityare interested in signing Danish forward Yousef Salech from Swedish sideIK Sirius, with the 22-year-old having scored 11 goals in 27 league matches last season. (Wales Online,external)

Blackburn Rovershave made a Â£1.75m bid forCoventry Citystriker Brandon Thomas Asante, with the Ghana international only making the starting XI once this season for the West Midlands side. (Sky Sports,external)

Preston North Endare in talks to sign defender Emir Karic from Austrian sideSturm Grazfor just his second spell away from his home country. (Football Insider,external)

Wrexhamare looking at a potential loan move forLiverpoolforward Jayden Danns, however Reds boss Arne Slot has not yet confirmed if the teenager is set for a departure from the Merseyside club.

The Red Dragons are also eyeingSheffield Wednesdaystriker Michael Smith, who is out of contract at the end of the season. (The Mirror,external)
